settings.heading: Ready to elevate your performance?
settings.description: Clean ingredients. Clinical doses. Transparent labels. Start your transformation today.

settings.heading: No proprietary blends or filler
settings.text: Every ingredient is listed at its full dose. No hiding behind "proprietary blend" language. You know exactly what you're taking and why.

settings.heading: Doses that match the research
settings.text: Every ingredient at its researched effective dose. No pixie-dusting. No underdosing. Just what the science says works.

settings.heading: Independent lab verification
settings.text: Every batch is sent to an independent lab for potency and purity testing. We publish the results so you never have to guess.

settings.heading: 60-day no-questions refund
settings.text: We stand behind every product. Try it for 60 days. If you don't see results, we'll give you a full refund. No questions asked.
